jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the target JDK.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target version does not match the installed JDK 21 toolchain.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for jakarta.annotation-api to replace the removed javax.annotation module from the JDK.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails with 'package javax.annotation does not exist' because javax.annotation was removed from the JDK in Java 11+.

jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a recent release compatible with Java 21.
jelatyna-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or function correctly with Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support.
